metadata.title: Phase 2 Backlog: ccb_test Growth Plan
metadata.description: 6 proposed tasks to grow ccb_test from 14 to 20 tasks. Each task targets testing and quality assurance activities.

proposed_tasks.description: Generate unit tests for an untested utility package in kubernetes/kubernetes. Agent must identify edge cases and achieve >80% branch coverage.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: deterministic: compile + run generated tests + coverage threshold check
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: coverage report is deterministic for pinned commit. Pass/fail threshold is objective.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by coverage percentage (0.5) + test compilation success (0.3) + edge case detection (0.2)

proposed_tasks.description: Write unit tests for a Django model serializer module. Must cover standard CRUD operations plus boundary conditions.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: deterministic: pytest execution + coverage threshold + mutation testing score
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: mutation testing kills are deterministic for pinned code. Coverage is objective.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by mutation kill rate (0.4) + line coverage (0.3) + test count vs expected (0.3)

proposed_tasks.description: Write integration tests for a feature flag evaluation API endpoint. Tests must exercise both gRPC and HTTP interfaces.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: deterministic: compile + run integration tests against test server + assertion coverage
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: API behavior is deterministic for pinned commit. Test pass/fail is objective.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by endpoint coverage (0.4) + error case handling (0.3) + test compilation (0.3)

proposed_tasks.description: Author integration tests for the media scanning pipeline. Must test file discovery, metadata extraction, and database persistence.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: deterministic: compile + run tests with test fixtures + pipeline stage coverage
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: media scanning behavior is deterministic for test fixtures. Stage coverage is objective.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by pipeline stage coverage (0.4) + fixture variety (0.3) + error handling (0.3)

proposed_tasks.description: Analyze test coverage gaps in Envoy's HTTP filter chain. Identify untested code paths and propose test cases with rationale.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: coverage gap identification accuracy + proposed test case quality + rationale correctness
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: coverage gaps are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by gap identification precision (0.4) + test case feasibility (0.3) + rationale quality (0.3)

proposed_tasks.description: Identify test coverage gaps in Kafka's consumer group coordinator. Map untested failure modes and propose regression tests.
proposed_tasks.verifier_pattern: weighted checklist: failure mode identification + proposed test correctness + coverage delta estimate
proposed_tasks.determinism: Ground truth: failure modes are deterministic for pinned commit. Checklist items are objectively verifiable.
proposed_tasks.partial_credit: Continuous 0.0-1.0: weighted by failure mode recall (0.4) + test correctness (0.3) + coverage estimate accuracy (0.3)
